  200| 
  201| **How it works:**
  202| 
  203| - `root.go` sets `SilenceErrors: true` globally - Cobra never prints errors
  204| - `main.go` prints errors to stderr, unless the error is a `SilentError`
  205| - Commands return `NewSilentError(err)` when they've already printed a custom message
  206| 
  207| **When to use `SilentError`:**
